Derived from surface closure target; package is descriptive and does not execute.
HOS-08 treats reusable capabilities as descriptive packages without importing marketplace or product app behavior.
A capability package is not execution authority; it records lifecycle, health, ownership, and consumer-visible outputs for baseline contracts.
